name: pigs-rent-monorepo
description: Sistema de Gestão Pigs Rent - Monorepo (Angola)
author: António Carlos Fernandes da Silva

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n "API,WEB" -c "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix api" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix web
